title: FREE AND REDUCED COST BREAKFAST AND LUNCH - 211info
text: INFORMATIONAL RECORD FREE AND REDUCED COST BREAKFAST AND LUNCH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The National School Lunch Program (NSLP) and the School Breakfast Program (SBP) are federally-assisted meal programs in public and nonprofit private schools and residential childcare institutions. These programs provide nutritionally balanced, low-cost, and free breakfasts and lunches. Schools and childcare centers may offer other nutrition programs, such as after-school snacks. Confidential Address Eligibility: -Children at participating schools whose families have incomes at or below 300% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) qualify for free meals. -Children at participating schools may qualify for reduced meals dependent on family size and household income. Hours: Varies, contact child's school for more information Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Contact child's school for information, visit school's website or apply here: www.ode.state.or.us/apps/FRLApp FEES: None or low-cost DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: School Breakfasts School Lunches/Snacks Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - SHORT-TERM RENT ASSISTANCE CRIMINAL CORRECTIONAL SYSTEM - TELMATE EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SCHOOL SUPPLIES FOOD - THE EMERGENCY FOOD ASSISTANCE PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATIONS INFORMATION SERVICES - COLD RELATED ILLNESS FAQ LEGAL SERVICES - NOTARY SERVICES LEGAL SERVICES - PUBLIC CHARGE INFORMATIONAL RECORD PUBLIC SAFETY - BURNING BANS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. INFORMATIONAL RECORD
